{{Infobox location
| name = Emperor's bedroom
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is located in the [[Emperor's bedroom]].}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s ruined bedroom is visible from the throne.}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
